_comment: Pinned refs for third-party tooling used by the swarm. Bumping a pin is a human commit, not an agent action (engineering.prompt). Never resolve a floating branch head - always pin to an exact commit SHA.

secondary_host_substrate._comment: BL-101: pinned substrate for provisioning a headless secondary swarm host (Pi 5 / VPS). installed_by never resolves a floating 'latest' - each install command below interpolates the exact version pinned here.

node.note: Active LTS as of provisioning (2026-07). Installed via NodeSource's setup_24.x (pins the MAJOR line; only that major's own patch releases apply, never a different major).

claude_cli.install_method: native installer, pinned version arg (never the floating 'latest'/'stable' channel arg)
claude_cli.auto_update_disabled_via: DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER=1 in ~/.claude/settings.json env - a headless box must not silently self-update mid-operation

github_actions_runner.note: GitHub enforces upgrading self-hosted runners within 30 days of each new release (2026 policy) - this pin needs a periodic human bump, not a set-and-forget one.
